column1: # community conventions the fuzzy engine can't recover reliably. lemma is
# set when the form has a real paradigm (so "hold" shows its forms).
# ultra-short (2–3 chars): below the fuzzy length threshold, so the engine
# can only reach them through this exact-match layer. Keys are deliberately
# non-words (checked against the lexicon) so they never shadow a real word
# typed verbatim — keep-safety. lemma is the dictionary lemma where it has
# one, so a future hold-popup can offer case forms.
